rows.label: tlk46500174_03_msg0001
rows.name:
Fan-sama's death still casts
sorrow over the whole country,
but...

rows.label: tlk46500174_03_msg0002
rows.name:
But keeping the school closed
hurts the children too.

rows.label: tlk46500174_03_msg0003
rows.name:
Many children want it reopened.
Once the cathedral rite ends,
we'll reopen the school.

rows.label: tlk46500174_03_msg0004
rows.name:
Thinking of the children's joy
makes me smile too.
